response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and separated it into two scenes: the heist sequence (00:00-00:51) and the VTuber skit (00:52-04:46). 2. Identified the song playing during the skit as 'RENEGADE' by the Hololive English -Justice- group. 3. Used the web search tool to find the lyrics of 'RENEGADE'. 4. Verified the song title and lyrics and confirmed no vocal music in the first scene. 5. Compiled all information into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: The video features a skit involving the Hololive English VTuber group 'Justice', set against the backdrop of their original song 'RENEGADE'. The first part of the video is an instrumental heist sequence, followed by the main skit accompanied by the song 'RENEGADE'.

scenes.description: A heist scene in a museum where a character steals a statue. Instrumental background music is playing, but there are no vocals.
The skit continues with the Hololive English 'Justice' members, while the song 'RENEGADE' plays in the background throughout the scene.
